SERVO D0 BIN
func:
var buf = new Buffer(66); // build the binary array
buf[0] = 2;
buf[1] = 7;
buf[2] = 1;
buf[3] = 0;
buf[4] = 59;
buf[5] = 0x24; // UUID appId 0
buf[6] = 0; // 1
buf[7] = 0x25; // 2
buf[8] = 0; // 3
buf[9] = 0x26; // 4
buf[10] = 0; // 5
buf[11] = 0x27; // 6
buf[12] = 0; // 7
buf[13] = 0x28; // 8
buf[14] = 0; // 9
buf[15] = 0x29; // 10
buf[16] = 0; // 11
buf[17] = 0x3a; // 12
buf[18] = 3; // 13
buf[19] = 0xf; // 14
buf[20] = 0xf; // 15
buf[21] = 0x24; // UUID ncapId 0
buf[22] = 0; // 1
buf[23] = 0x25; // 2
buf[24] = 0; // 3
buf[25] = 0x26; // 4
buf[26] = 0; // 5
buf[27] = 0x27; // 6
buf[28] = 0; // 7
buf[29] = 0x28; // 8
buf[30] = 0; // 9
buf[31] = 0x29; // 10
buf[32] = 0; // 11
buf[33] = 0x3a; // 12
buf[34] = 1; // 13
buf[35] = 0xf; // 14
buf[36] = 0xf; // 15
buf[37] = 0x24; // UUID timId 0
buf[38] = 0; // 1
buf[39] = 0x25; // 2
buf[40] = 0; // 3
buf[41] = 0x26; // 4
buf[42] = 0; // 5
buf[43] = 0x27; // 6
buf[44] = 0; // 7
buf[45] = 0x28; // 8
buf[46] = 0; // 9
buf[47] = 0x29; // 10
buf[48] = 0; // 11
buf[49] = 0x3a; // 12
buf[50] = 2; // 13
buf[51] = 0xf; // 14
buf[52] = 3; // 15
buf[53] = 0; // ChannelId 
buf[54] = 4; //
buf[55] = 0; // samplingMode 0=default
// dataValue as ASCII string (NCAP reads 'str' until null), then 8-byte time8
var s = '' + Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseInt(msg.payload, 10) || 0));
var out = Buffer.concat([buf.slice(0, 56), Buffer.from(s, 'ascii'), Buffer.from([0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0])]);
out[3] = 0; out[4] = (out.length - 7) & 0xff; // msgLength (informational; str is null-terminated)
msg.payload = out;
return msg;
